note: Three atom pairs, each chosen to exercise a DIFFERENT gate so the deterministic 4-gate filter is visibly discriminating: CAND_001 should traverse the full path; CAND_002 carries a quarantined atom (Gate 2 must drop it regardless of score); CAND_003 is low-content talk-language (should fail Gate 1 and/or Gate 4). 'smoke_io' holds DECLARED, fixed scorer inputs (the values a real run would fetch via web search); they are fixtures, not real I/O, and are disclosed as such in smallest_rules.json.

atom_a.text: Sparse mixture-of-experts routing activates only a few expert subnetworks per token, so the router gates compute toward the inputs each expert specializes in.

atom_b.text: In developmental biology, regulatory gene networks selectively activate developmental modules, so a single genome induces many distinct body plans depending on which modules switch on.

candidates.expected_demonstration: full-path candidate: cross-disciplinary (ML routing x evo-devo modular activation), mechanism-rich, novel inputs -> should clear Gate 1 and pass Gates 2-4 if the merge stays grounded.

atom_a.text: Test-time training updates a small inner model on each input sequence, so the network adapts its own weights during inference rather than only at train time.

atom_b.text: Evo-devo competency architectures treat cells as agents that solve morphogenetic problems, transforming local errors into coherent global anatomy.

candidates.expected_demonstration: Gate 2 quarantine test: atom_b ARXIV_R10_evodevo is in harness_rules.quarantined_atoms, so this candidate MUST be dropped at Gate 2 even though its score and mechanism would otherwise be strong.

atom_a.text: Basically, you know, AI is gonna be, like, really big and obviously change everything, I mean, sort of.

atom_b.text: Right? Like, the models just kind of get better over time, you know, it's wild, okay so.

candidates.expected_demonstration: low-content talk-language pair: no mechanism vocabulary, heavy fillers, saturated/low-novelty inputs -> should fail Gate 1 (composite below threshold) and Gate 4 (no mechanism verb / no groundable verbatim quote).
